variables.input:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }
| fields status

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType] }
| fields eventType

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { region = parsed[properties][region] }
| fields region

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { service = parsed[properties][service] }
| fields service

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { impactType = parsed[properties][impactType] }
| fields impactType

0.title: Active Issues
0.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Active"
| summarize activeCount = count()

1.title: Events by Status
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service], impactType = parsed[properties][impactType]
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| filter in(impactType, array($ImpactType))
| summarize count = count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }

2.title: Events by Incident Type
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service], impactType = parsed[properties][impactType]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| filter in(impactType, array($ImpactType))
| summarize count = count(), by: { eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType] }

3.title: Service Health Summary
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    title = parsed[properties][title],
    service = parsed[properties][service],
    region = parsed[properties][region],
    eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    stage = parsed[properties][stage],
    trackingId = parsed[properties][trackingId],
    impactType = parsed[properties][impactType],
    impactStart = parsed[properties][impactStartTime],
    impactEnd = parsed[properties][impactMitigationTime],
    isHIR = parsed[properties][isHIR],
    eventTime = parsed[time]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| filter in(impactType, array($ImpactType))
| fields title, service, region, eventType, status, stage, trackingId, impactType, impactStart, impactEnd, isHIR, eventTime
| sort eventTime desc

4.title: Events by Service
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], region = parsed[properties][region], impactType = parsed[properties][impactType]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(impactType, array($ImpactType))
| summarize count = count(), by: { service = parsed[properties][service] }
| sort count desc

5.title: Events by Region
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], service = parsed[properties][service], impactType = parsed[properties][impactType]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| filter in(impactType, array($ImpactType))
| summarize count = count(), by: { region = parsed[properties][region] }
| sort count desc
| limit 10

6.title: Timeline of Events
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service], impactType = parsed[properties][impactType]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| filter in(impactType, array($ImpactType))
| summarize count = count(), by: { timeframe = bin(timestamp, 1h), eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType] }

7.title: Total Events
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize totalCount = count()

8.title: Resolved
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Resolved"
| summarize resolvedCount = count()

9.title: Incidents
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][incidentType] == "Incident"
| summarize incidentCount = count()

10.title: Maintenance
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][incidentType] == "Maintenance"
| summarize maintenanceCount = count()

11.title: Event Details
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    title = parsed[properties][title],
    trackingId = parsed[properties][trackingId],
    service = parsed[properties][service],
    region = parsed[properties][region],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType],
    stage = parsed[properties][stage],
    impactType = parsed[properties][impactType],
    impactStart = parsed[properties][impactStartTime],
    impactEnd = parsed[properties][impactMitigationTime],
    isHIR = parsed[properties][isHIR],
    sensitive = parsed[properties][sensitive],
    maintenanceType = parsed[properties][maintenanceType],
    impactedServices = parsed[properties][impactedServices],
    communication = parsed[properties][communication]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| filter in(impactType, array($ImpactType))
| fields title, trackingId, service, region, status, eventType, stage, impactType, impactStart, impactEnd, isHIR, sensitive, maintenanceType, communication
| sort timestamp desc

12.title: High Impact (HIR)
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][isHIR] == true
| summarize hirCount = count()

13.title: Sensitive Events
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][sensitive] == true
| summarize sensitiveCount = count()

14.title: Events by Impact Type
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| summarize count = count(), by: { impactType = parsed[properties][impactType] }
| sort count desc
